chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-100 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 15-04-2019 Mr. Hidayatullah S.Baloch Advocate for applicant Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, DPG.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Admittedly the alleged detenue Mst.Safia is residing in village Nadir Sultan, District Shikarpur which is out of territorial jurisdiction of appellate jurisdiction of this court as provided under section 491 Cr.P.C. Learned counsel for the applicant conceding the facts does not press this application and states that the applicant shall avail remedy available to him under the law including the remedy of filing family suit for restitution of conjugal rights before the concerned Court. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
